children.heading: Investment Company Act
children.label: b Investment Company Act
children.text: A risk retention group shall not be considered to be an investment company for purposes of the Investment Company Act of 1940 ( et seq.).15 U.S.C. 80a–1

children.heading: Blue sky law
children.label: c Blue sky law
children.text: The ownership interests of members in a risk retention group shall not be considered securities for purposes of any State blue sky law.
